title: exec runner - wrapper for container CLI
description: Internal exec package that wraps os/exec calls to the Apple container CLI. RunJSON(ctx, args) runs command, parses JSON output. RunRaw(ctx, args) returns raw bytes. RunStatus(ctx, args) returns exit code. Configurable binary path. Structured error types that include stderr output. Timeout via context.

title: Network endpoints
description: POST /networks/create -> container network create (handle Name, Subnet, Internal). GET /networks -> container network list. GET /networks/{id} -> container network inspect. DELETE /networks/{id} -> container network delete. Map to Docker NetworkResource format.

title: Container stop, kill, and remove endpoints
description: POST /containers/{id}/stop -> container stop. POST /containers/{id}/kill -> container kill (translate signal param). DELETE /containers/{id} -> container delete (handle force query param, handle v=true for volume removal). Return appropriate status codes (204 success, 304 already stopped, 404 not found).

title: OpenClaw sandbox conformance tests
description: End-to-end test: start gangway, point OpenClaw sandbox config at gangway socket, verify OpenClaw can create/start/exec/logs/stop/remove sandbox containers. Test with openclaw-sandbox:bookworm-slim image. Test sandbox browser container lifecycle. Verify sandbox workspace mounts work. Document any OpenClaw-specific quirks.

title: Image list and pull endpoints
description: GET /images/json -> container image list --format json. Map to Docker ImageListResponse (Id, RepoTags, Size, Created). POST /images/create (pull) -> container image pull. Handle fromImage and tag query params. Stream pull progress as Docker-format JSON lines. POST /build -> container build (handle Dockerfile tar context).

title: Container logs endpoint
description: GET /containers/{id}/logs -> container logs. Handle query params: stdout, stderr, follow, tail, since, timestamps. Stream output if follow=true (keep connection open, poll container logs). Return multiplexed stream format matching Docker API (8-byte header per frame: stream type + size). Non-follow mode returns plain text.

title: Socket listener and HTTP mux scaffold
description: Set up unix socket listener with net.Listen, HTTP mux routing Docker API paths. Parse flags: --socket, --container-bin, --log-level. Implement GET /_ping (return 'OK'), GET /version (return compatible Docker API version struct), GET /info (return minimal system info). Signal handling for clean shutdown (remove socket file).

title: Container create and start endpoints
description: POST /containers/create accepts Docker ContainerCreateRequest (Image, Cmd, Env, Volumes, ExposedPorts, HostConfig.Binds, HostConfig.PortBindings, HostConfig.Memory, HostConfig.NanoCPUs). Translate to container run args. Handle name from query param. POST /containers/{id}/start triggers container start. Return container ID.

title: Container exec endpoint
description: POST /containers/{id}/exec -> create exec instance. POST /exec/{id}/start -> container exec {name} {command}. Handle Cmd, Env, WorkingDir, AttachStdin/Stdout/Stderr, Tty from Docker ExecConfig. Return exec output. Map exec exit code to Docker ExecInspect response for GET /exec/{id}/json.

title: Container list and inspect endpoints
description: GET /containers/json -> container list --all --format json. Translate Apple container list output to Docker ContainerListResponse format. Map fields: ID, Names, Image, State, Status. GET /containers/{id}/json -> container inspect --format json. Return Docker ContainerInspectResponse with Config, State, NetworkSettings, Mounts.
